tEn: DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5: Harnessing Proof Assistant Feedback for Reinforcement Learning and Monte-Carlo Tree Search
tZh: DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5：利用证明助手反馈进行强化学习与蒙特卡洛树搜索
sEn: DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 achieves state-of-the-art results on theorem proving benchmarks by combining reinforcement learning from proof assistant feedback with Monte-Carlo tree search.
sZh: DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5通过结合证明助手反馈的强化学习和蒙特卡洛树搜索，在定理证明基准上取得了最先进的结果。
absEn: We introduce DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5, an open-source language model designed for theorem proving in Lean 4, which enhances DeepSeek-Prover-V1 by optimizing both training and inference processes. Pre-trained on DeepSeekMath-Base with specialization in formal mathematical languages, the model undergoes supervised fine-tuning using an enhanced formal theorem proving dataset derived from DeepSeek-Prover-V1. Further refinement is achieved through reinforcement learning from proof assistant feedback (RLPAF). Beyond the single-pass whole-proof generation approach of DeepSeek-Prover-V1, we propose RMaxTS, a variant of Monte-Carlo tree search that employs an intrinsic-reward-driven exploration strategy to generate diverse proof paths. DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 demonstrates significant improvements over DeepSeek-Prover-V1, achieving new state-of-the-art results on the test set of the high school level miniF2F benchmark ($63.5\%$) and the undergraduate level ProofNet benchmark ($25.3\%$).
absZh: 我们推出了DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5，这是一个专为Lean 4定理证明设计的开源语言模型，它通过优化训练和推理过程增强了DeepSeek-Prover-V1。该模型在DeepSeek-Math-Base上预训练，专注于形式化数学语言，然后使用来自DeepSeek-Prover-V1的增强形式化定理证明数据集进行监督微调。通过证明助手反馈的强化学习（RLPAF）进一步优化。除了DeepSeek-Prover-V1的单次完整证明生成方法外，我们提出了RMaxTS，这是一种蒙特卡洛树搜索的变体，采用内在奖励驱动的探索策略来生成多样化的证明路径。DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5在高中水平的miniF2F基准测试集（63.5%）和本科水平的ProofNet基准测试集（25.3%）上取得了新的最先进结果，相比DeepSeek-Prover-V1有显著提升。

contrib.en: Proposes RMaxTS, a Monte-Carlo tree search variant with intrinsic-reward-driven exploration for sparse-reward proof search.
contrib.zh: 提出RMaxTS，一种基于内在奖励驱动的蒙特卡洛树搜索变体，用于稀疏奖励的证明搜索。

contrib.en: Introduces a truncate-and-resume mechanism that integrates whole-proof generation with proof-step generation via tree search.
contrib.zh: 引入截断-恢复机制，通过树搜索将整体证明生成与证明步骤生成相结合。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art results on miniF2F (63.5%) and ProofNet (25.3%) benchmarks using a 7B parameter model.
contrib.zh: 使用7B参数模型在miniF2F（63.5%）和ProofNet（25.3%）基准上取得最先进结果。

contrib.en: Employs reinforcement learning from proof assistant feedback (RLPAF) with GRPO to enhance whole-proof generation.
contrib.zh: 采用基于证明助手反馈的强化学习（RLPAF）结合GRPO算法，增强整体证明生成能力。

contrib.en: Augments supervised fine-tuning data with natural language chain-of-thought comments and intermediate tactic states.
contrib.zh: 通过自然语言思维链注释和中间策略状态增强监督微调数据。

contrib.en: Provides open-source model and code for Monte-Carlo tree search to facilitate further research.
contrib.zh: 开源模型和蒙特卡洛树搜索代码，以促进进一步研究。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to Lean 4 theorem prover; generalization to other proof assistants not verified.
limits.zh: 评估仅限于Lean 4证明助手；未验证对其他证明助手的泛化能力。

limits.en: Performance on miniF2F and ProofNet may not reflect real-world complex theorem proving scenarios.
limits.zh: 在miniF2F和ProofNet上的性能可能无法反映真实世界的复杂定理证明场景。

limits.en: RMaxTS relies on intrinsic rewards which may not scale to extremely large search spaces.
limits.zh: RMaxTS依赖内在奖励，可能无法扩展到极大的搜索空间。

limits.en: Model size (7B parameters) may limit reasoning depth compared to larger frontier models.
limits.zh: 模型规模（7B参数）可能限制推理深度，与更大的前沿模型相比存在差距。

limits.en: Exploitation aspect of proof search (e.g., critic model) not addressed; future work needed.
limits.zh: 证明搜索的利用方面（如评论模型）未解决；需要未来工作。

items.en: We introduce DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5, an open-source language model designed for theorem proving in Lean 4, which enhances DeepSeek-Prover-V1 by optimizing both training and inference processes. Pre-trained on DeepSeekMath-Base with specialization in formal mathematical languages, the model undergoes supervised fine-tuning using an enhanced formal theorem proving dataset derived from DeepSeek-Prover-V1. Further refinement is achieved through reinforcement learning from proof assistant feedback (RLPAF). Beyond the single-pass whole-proof generation approach of DeepSeek-Prover-V1, we propose RMaxTS, a variant of Monte-Carlo tree search that employs an intrinsic-reward-driven exploration strategy to generate diverse proof paths. DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 demonstrates significant improvements over DeepSeek-Prover-V1, achieving new state-of-the-art results on the test set of the high school level miniF2F benchmark (63.5%) and the undergraduate level ProofNet benchmark (25.3%).
items.zh: 我们介绍了 DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5，这是一个专为 Lean 4 定理证明设计的开源语言模型，通过优化训练和推理过程增强了 DeepSeek-Prover-V1。该模型在 DeepSeekMath-Base 上预训练，专注于形式数学语言，然后使用从 DeepSeek-Prover-V1 衍生的增强形式定理证明数据集进行监督微调。通过来自证明助手反馈的强化学习（RLPAF）进一步优化。除了 DeepSeek-Prover-V1 的单次完整证明生成方法外，我们提出了 RMaxTS，这是一种蒙特卡洛树搜索的变体，采用内在奖励驱动的探索策略来生成多样化的证明路径。DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 在高中水平的 miniF2F 基准测试集（63.5%）和本科水平的 ProofNet 基准测试集（25.3%）上取得了新的最先进结果，相比 DeepSeek-Prover-V1 有显著提升。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Pass rates of models on formal theorem proving benchmarks in Lean 4: the high school level miniF2F-test benchmark (Zheng et al., 2022) and the undergraduate level ProofNet benchmark (Azerbayev et al., 2023). We compare both the pre-trained and fine-tuned versions of DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 with strong baselines.
items.capZh: 图 1：模型在 Lean 4 形式定理证明基准上的通过率：高中水平的 miniF2F-test 基准（Zheng 等人，2022）和本科水平的 ProofNet 基准（Azerbayev 等人，2023）。我们比较了 DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 的预训练和微调版本与强基线的表现。

items.en: Recent advancements in large language models have significantly influenced mathematical reasoning and theorem proving in artificial intelligence. Despite notable progress in natural language domains, language models still encounter substantial challenges in formal theorem proving, e.g. using Lean (Moura and Ullrich, 2021) and Isabelle (Paulson, 1994), which requires rigorous derivations satisfying formal specifications of the verification system. Even advanced models like GPT-4 (OpenAI, 2023) struggle with complex formal proofs, underscoring the intricate nature of both the coding and the mathematics involved. A formal theorem proving model must not only grasp the syntax and semantics of formal systems like the Lean theorem prover but also align abstract mathematical reasoning with precise formal representation.
items.zh: 大型语言模型的最新进展显著影响了人工智能中的数学推理和定理证明。尽管在自然语言领域取得了显著进展，但语言模型在形式定理证明中仍面临重大挑战，例如使用 Lean（Moura 和 Ullrich，2021）和 Isabelle（Paulson，1994），这需要满足验证系统形式规范的严格推导。即使是像 GPT-4（OpenAI，2023）这样的先进模型也难以处理复杂的形式证明，这凸显了所涉及的编码和数学的复杂性。形式定理证明模型不仅需要掌握 Lean 定理证明器等形式系统的语法和语义，还需要将抽象数学推理与精确形式表示对齐。

items.en: Language models in formal theorem proving typically employ two strategies: proof-step generation (Polu and Sutskever, 2020; Jiang et al., 2022a; Lample et al., 2022; Yang et al., 2023; Wu et al., 2024) and whole-proof generation (Jiang et al., 2022b; Zhao et al., 2023; Wang et al., 2023a). Proof-step generation predicts each subsequent tactic and verifies it using the formal verifier to obtain updated information about the current tactic state, often utilizing tree search techniques to construct valid proofs. In contrast, whole-proof generation is computationally efficient, which produces an entire proof code based on the theorem statement, requiring less communication budget to coordinate between the prover model and the formal theorem verifier. While DeepSeek-Prover-V1 (Xin et al., 2024) has achieved state-of-the-art results in Lean 4 with whole-proof generation, this paradigm presents its unique challenges. It requires long-horizon sequence prediction without access to intermediate tactic states, and future tactics depend on these hidden results. In Lean’s tactic mode, proofs are constructed through a sequence of tactics that transform the proof state. This sequential nature introduces the risk of compounding errors (Ross et al., 2011), where a single misinterpretation can lead to significant deviations from a valid proof path. More specifically, the auto-regressive model may have incorrect believes on intermediate tactic states when generating long proofs.
items.zh: 形式定理证明中的语言模型通常采用两种策略：证明步骤生成（Polu 和 Sutskever，2020；Jiang 等人，2022a；Lample 等人，2022；Yang 等人，2023；Wu 等人，2024）和完整证明生成（Jiang 等人，2022b；Zhao 等人，2023；Wang 等人，2023a）。证明步骤生成预测每个后续策略，并使用形式验证器验证以获得当前策略状态的更新信息，通常利用树搜索技术构建有效证明。相比之下，完整证明生成计算效率高，它根据定理陈述生成整个证明代码，需要较少的通信预算来协调证明模型和形式定理验证器。虽然 DeepSeek-Prover-V1（Xin 等人，2024）通过完整证明生成在 Lean 4 中取得了最先进的结果，但这种范式带来了独特的挑战。它需要长程序列预测，而无法访问中间策略状态，并且后续策略依赖于这些隐藏结果。在 Lean 的策略模式中，证明是通过一系列转换证明状态的策略构建的。这种顺序性引入了复合错误的风险（Ross 等人，2011），其中单个误解可能导致与有效证明路径的显著偏离。更具体地说，自回归模型在生成长证明时可能对中间策略状态有错误信念。

items.en: To seamlessly integrate intermediate tactic states in proof-step generation while maintaining the simplicity and computational efficiency of whole-proof generation, we have developed a unified approach in DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5. This method combines the strengths of both proof-step and whole-proof generation techniques through a truncate-and-resume mechanism. The process begins with standard whole-proof generation, where the language model completes the proof code following the theorem statement prefix. The Lean prover then verifies this code. If the proof is correct and complete, the procedure terminates. If an error is detected, the code is truncated at the first error message, and any subsequent code is discarded. The successfully generated proof code is then used as a prompt for the generation of next proof segment. To enhance the accuracy of the model’s new completions, we append the latest state from the Lean 4 prover as a comment at the end of the prompt. Notably, our method is not restricted to resuming from the last successfully applied tactic. We integrate the truncate-and-resume mechanism into Monte-Carlo tree search (MCTS; Coulom, 2006) in which the truncation points are scheduled by the tree search policy. In addition, we propose a novel reward-free exploration algorithm for MCTS to address the reward sparsity issue of proof search. We assign the tree search agent intrinsic motivation, a.k.a. curiosity (Schmidhuber, 2010), to extensively explore the tactic state space. These algorithmic modules extend the functionality of our whole-proof generation model to become a flexible tool for interactive theorem proving, which can effectively utilize the proof assistant feedback and generate diverse solution candidates.
items.zh: 为了在保持完整证明生成的简单性和计算效率的同时，无缝集成证明步骤生成中的中间策略状态，我们在 DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 中开发了一种统一方法。该方法通过截断-恢复机制结合了证明步骤和完整证明生成技术的优势。该过程从标准完整证明生成开始，语言模型在定理陈述前缀后完成证明代码。然后 Lean 验证器验证此代码。如果证明正确且完整，则过程终止。如果检测到错误，则在第一个错误消息处截断代码，并丢弃后续代码。然后，成功生成的证明代码用作生成下一个证明段的提示。为了提高模型新补全的准确性，我们将 Lean 4 验证器的最新状态作为注释附加到提示末尾。值得注意的是，我们的方法不限于从最后一个成功应用的策略恢复。我们将截断-恢复机制集成到蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS；Coulom，2006）中，其中截断点由树搜索策略调度。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的 MCTS 无奖励探索算法，以解决证明搜索中的奖励稀疏问题。我们为树搜索智能体分配内在动机，即好奇心（Schmidhuber，2010），以广泛探索策略状态空间。这些算法模块将我们的完整证明生成模型扩展为交互式定理证明的灵活工具，可以有效利用证明助手反馈并生成多样化的解决方案候选。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Overall Framework. DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 is trained through pre-training, supervised fine-tuning, and reinforcement learning. During supervised fine-tuning, the pre-trained model receives an incomplete theorem proof ending with a tactic state comment keyword. The model is trained to predict the content of this tactic state (auxiliary objective) and complete the subsequent proof steps (main objective). In the reinforcement learning stage, given an incomplete theorem proof and ground-truth tactic state from the Lean prover, we roll out the fine-tuned model to generate multiple proof candidates, which are then verified by the Lean prover. The verification results for these candidates are used as binary (0-1) rewards to further optimize the model and enhance its alignment with the formal specifications of the verification system. For model inference, we offer two alternatives: single-pass sampling and Monte-Carlo tree search.
items.capZh: 图 2：整体框架。DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 通过预训练、监督微调和强化学习进行训练。在监督微调期间，预训练模型接收一个不完整的定理证明，以策略状态注释关键字结尾。模型被训练预测该策略状态的内容（辅助目标）并完成后续证明步骤（主要目标）。在强化学习阶段，给定一个不完整的定理证明和来自 Lean 验证器的真实策略状态，我们展开微调模型以生成多个证明候选，然后由 Lean 验证器验证。这些候选的验证结果用作二元（0-1）奖励，以进一步优化模型并增强其与验证系统形式规范的对齐。对于模型推理，我们提供两种选择：单次采样和蒙特卡洛树搜索。

items.en: We present a comprehensive framework for developing a language model-based formal mathematics prover, integrating several key components: large-scale mathematical pre-training, formal mathematics corpus construction and augmentation, online reinforcement learning from proof assistant feedback, and a tree search methodology for long-term planning in theorem proving. The pre-trained model, supervised fine-tuned model, and reinforcement learning model, along with the code for the Monte-Carlo tree search algorithm, are publicly available for further research and application.
items.zh: 我们提出了一个开发基于语言模型的形式数学证明器的综合框架，集成了几个关键组件：大规模数学预训练、形式数学语料库构建和增强、来自证明助手反馈的在线强化学习，以及用于定理证明中长期规划的树搜索方法。预训练模型、监督微调模型和强化学习模型，以及蒙特卡洛树搜索算法的代码，均可公开获取，以用于进一步的研究和应用。

items.en: Pre-Training: We enhance our base model’s capabilities in formal theorem proving and mathematical reasoning by further pre-training on high-quality mathematics and code data, with a focus on formal languages such as Lean, Isabelle, and Metamath.
items.zh: 预训练：我们通过在高质量数学和代码数据上进一步预训练，增强基础模型在形式定理证明和数学推理方面的能力，重点关注形式语言，如 Lean、Isabelle 和 Metamath。

items.en: Supervised Fine-Tuning: We improve the Lean 4 code completion dataset by implementing two data augmentation techniques. First, we use DeepSeek-Coder V2 236B (Zhu et al., 2024) to annotate natural language chain-of-thought comments alongside Lean 4 code, aligning formal theorem proving with natural language reasoning. Second, we insert intermediate tactic state information within the Lean 4 proof code, enabling our model to leverage compiler feedback effectively. The resulting dataset is then used to fine-tune the pre-trained model.
items.zh: 监督微调：我们通过实施两种数据增强技术改进了 Lean 4 代码补全数据集。首先，我们使用 DeepSeek-Coder V2 236B（Zhu 等人，2024）在 Lean 4 代码旁边注释自然语言思维链注释，将形式定理证明与自然语言推理对齐。其次，我们在 Lean 4 证明代码中插入中间策略状态信息，使我们的模型能够有效利用编译器反馈。然后使用生成的数据集对预训练模型进行微调。

items.en: Reinforcement Learning: We employ the GRPO algorithm (Shao et al., 2024) to perform reinforcement learning from proof assistant feedback (RLPAF) on the supervised fine-tuned model. Verification results from the Lean prover serve as reward supervision, enhancing the model’s alignment with the formal specifications of the verification system.
items.zh: 强化学习：我们采用 GRPO 算法（Shao 等人，2024）对监督微调模型进行来自证明助手反馈的强化学习（RLPAF）。来自 Lean 验证器的验证结果作为奖励监督，增强模型与验证系统形式规范的对齐。

items.en: Monte-Carlo Tree Search: We advance the tree search method in formal theorem proving by introducing a novel abstraction and a corresponding search algorithm. Our truncate-and-resume mechanism acts as a state-action abstraction, seamlessly integrating the tree search process into the whole-proof generation framework. We present RMaxTS, an innovative Monte-Carlo tree search algorithm that leverages the RMax (Brafman and Tennenholtz, 2002) strategy to tackle exploration challenges in sparse-reward proof search problems. By assigning intrinsic rewards, this algorithm encourages the prover agent to generate diverse planning paths, thereby fostering extensive exploration of the proof space.
items.zh: 蒙特卡洛树搜索：我们通过引入一种新颖的抽象和相应的搜索算法，推进了形式定理证明中的树搜索方法。我们的截断-恢复机制充当状态-动作抽象，将树搜索过程无缝集成到完整证明生成框架中。我们提出了 RMaxTS，一种创新的蒙特卡洛树搜索算法，利用 RMax（Brafman 和 Tennenholtz，2002）策略来解决稀疏奖励证明搜索问题中的探索挑战。通过分配内在奖励，该算法鼓励证明智能体生成多样化的规划路径，从而促进对证明空间的广泛探索。

items.en: miniF2F: In the single-pass whole-proof generation setting, DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 achieved a pass rate of 60.2% on the test set of miniF2F, marking a significant improvement of absolute 10.2 percentage points over DeepSeek-Prover-V1’s 50.0%. Incorporating tree search techniques further elevated the pass rate to a new state-of-the-art 63.5%.
items.zh: miniF2F：在单次完整证明生成设置中，DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 在 miniF2F 测试集上达到了 60.2% 的通过率，相比 DeepSeek-Prover-V1 的 50.0% 显著提高了 10.2 个百分点。结合树搜索技术进一步将通过率提升至新的最先进水平 63.5%。

items.en: ProofNet: DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 also demonstrated strong performance in the single-pass whole-proof generation setting for ProofNet, with pass rates of 21.6% on the validation set and 23.7% on the test set. The integration of tree search techniques further enhanced these results, achieving new state-of-the-art pass rates of 25.4% on the validation set and 25.3% on the test set.
items.zh: ProofNet：DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 在 ProofNet 的单次完整证明生成设置中也表现出色，验证集通过率为 21.6%，测试集通过率为 23.7%。树搜索技术的集成进一步增强了这些结果，在验证集和测试集上分别达到了 25.4% 和 25.3% 的新最先进通过率。

items.en: To enhance our language model’s proficiency in generating formal proofs and reasoning through mathematical language, we further pre-train our base model (Shao et al., 2024). This refinement involved training on high-quality datasets that include both code and natural language mathematical content. We specifically focused on formal languages widely used in proof assistants, such as Lean, Isabelle, and Metamath. We designate this improved model as DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-Base.
items.zh: 为了增强我们的语言模型在生成形式证明和通过数学语言推理方面的能力，我们进一步预训练了基础模型（Shao 等人，2024）。这一改进涉及在包含代码和自然语言数学内容的高质量数据集上进行训练。我们特别关注证明助手中广泛使用的形式语言，如 Lean、Isabelle 和 Metamath。我们将此改进模型命名为 DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-Base。

items.en: In this section, we explore the methodology and processes involved in the supervised fine-tuning (SFT) of DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5. Specifically, we augment the proof dataset from DeepSeek-Prover-V1 by adding detailed explanatory comments. This enhancement aims to improve the alignment between natural language descriptions and Lean 4 code, thereby facilitating better formal mathematical reasoning. Additionally, we incorporate intermediate tactic state information as an auxiliary prediction task to support the truncate-and-resume mechanism used in the Monte-Carlo Tree Search process. We refer to the resulting model as DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-SFT.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们探讨 DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 监督微调（SFT）的方法和过程。具体来说，我们通过添加详细的解释性注释来增强 DeepSeek-Prover-V1 的证明数据集。这一增强旨在改善自然语言描述与 Lean 4 代码之间的对齐，从而促进更好的形式数学推理。此外，我们引入中间策略状态信息作为辅助预测任务，以支持蒙特卡洛树搜索过程中使用的截断-恢复机制。我们将得到的模型称为 DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-SFT。

items.en: We develop a comprehensive Lean 4 code completion dataset for the supervised fine-tuning. This dataset includes synthetic proof code derived from a wide range of formal theorems. These theorems are sourced from various projects, such as the standard Lean 4 math library Mathlib4 (Mathlib Community, 2020), synthetic theorems from DeepSeek-Prover-V1 (Xin et al., 2024) and Lean Workbook (Ying et al., 2024a), and validation sets from the miniF2F (Zheng et al., 2022) and ProofNet (Azerbayev et al., 2023) benchmarks. To augment the formal proof data, we employed an expert iteration process (Polu and Sutskever, 2020). This involves generating proofs using the language model, verifying the generated proof data, retraining the model with the verified data, and then using the optimized model to generate additional proof data. Between each iteration, we use DeepSeek-Coder V2 236B (Zhu et al., 2024) to annotate the thought process before the proof code as comments. Finally, we tailor these data for the truncate-and-resume mechanism for Monte-Carlo Tree Search (details in Section 3.1). The resulting proof dataset consists of 9,645k sequences.
items.zh: 我们开发了一个全面的 Lean 4 代码补全数据集用于监督微调。该数据集包括从各种形式定理派生的合成证明代码。这些定理来自多个项目，例如标准 Lean 4 数学库 Mathlib4（Mathlib Community，2020）、来自 DeepSeek-Prover-V1（Xin 等人，2024）和 Lean Workbook（Ying 等人，2024a）的合成定理，以及来自 miniF2F（Zheng 等人，2022）和 ProofNet（Azerbayev 等人，2023）基准的验证集。为了增强形式证明数据，我们采用了专家迭代过程（Polu 和 Sutskever，2020）。这涉及使用语言模型生成证明，验证生成的证明数据，使用验证过的数据重新训练模型，然后使用优化后的模型生成额外的证明数据。在每次迭代之间，我们使用 DeepSeek-Coder V2 236B（Zhu 等人，2024）在证明代码之前注释思考过程作为注释。最后，我们针对蒙特卡洛树搜索的截断-恢复机制定制这些数据（详见第 3.1 节）。生成的证明数据集包含 964.5 万个序列。

items.en: In DeepSeek-Prover-V1, we identified a significant gap between problem-solving strategies in natural language and theorem proving in Lean. In natural language, models generate detailed deduction steps to construct proofs, whereas in Lean, they often rely on a sequence of high-level tactic calls to brute-force solutions. These high-level tactics, while effective, obscure their internal workings and outcomes, hindering the model’s ability to resolve complex proof goals with structured mathematical reasoning. To address this issue, we develop an approach that incorporates natural language reasoning before generating theorem proof code. Similar to Lean-STaR (Lin et al., 2024), which performs isolated chain-of-thought reasoning (Wei et al., 2022; Feng et al., 2023) before each proof step, our method integrates this reasoning directly as comments within the proof code. We use the DeepSeek-Coder V2 236B (Zhu et al., 2024) to enhance existing data in DeepSeek-Prover-V1 in two ways: first, by inserting a complete natural language solution at the beginning of the proof block, and second, by alternately inserting specific natural language steps for corresponding Lean tactics. Training the model with this data format enforces it to propose complete mathematical reasoning at the beginning of the proof block and detailed step planning before each tactic. This approach successfully develops new behaviors, employing delicate mathematical thinking to guide the generation of tactics. In the training data, two distinct guiding prompts are used to differentiate between the CoT (Chain of Thought) mode and the non-CoT mode for proof code completion. Examples of input and output in both modes can be found in Appendix A.
items.zh: 在 DeepSeek-Prover-V1 中，我们发现了自然语言中的问题解决策略与 Lean 中的定理证明之间存在显著差距。在自然语言中，模型生成详细的推导步骤来构建证明，而在 Lean 中，它们通常依赖一系列高级策略调用来暴力求解。这些高级策略虽然有效，但掩盖了其内部工作和结果，阻碍了模型通过结构化数学推理解决复杂证明目标的能力。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种方法，在生成定理证明代码之前引入自然语言推理。类似于 Lean-STaR（Lin 等人，2024），它在每个证明步骤之前进行独立的思维链推理（Wei 等人，2022；Feng 等人，2023），我们的方法将这种推理直接作为注释集成到证明代码中。我们使用 DeepSeek-Coder V2 236B（Zhu 等人，2024）以两种方式增强 DeepSeek-Prover-V1 中的现有数据：首先，在证明块的开头插入完整的自然语言解决方案；其次，交替插入对应 Lean 策略的特定自然语言步骤。使用这种数据格式训练模型，强制其在证明块开头提出完整的数学推理，并在每个策略之前进行详细的步骤规划。这种方法成功开发了新的行为，使用精细的数学思维来指导策略的生成。在训练数据中，使用两种不同的引导提示来区分证明代码补全的 CoT（思维链）模式和非 CoT 模式。两种模式的输入和输出示例见附录 A。

items.en: To implement the truncate-and-resume mechanism for Monte-Carlo Tree Search, we needed to extract tactic information from the code generated by the model. We enhanced the Lean REPL (Read-Eval-Print Loop; Leanprover Community, 2023) with data extraction tools from the LeanDojo (Yang et al., 2023) project. This allowed us to extract tactic information in triples, which include the position of each tactic, as well as the tactic states before and after its application. This information helps us identify the specific tactic code that triggers verification errors (used in the expansion step for tree search, see Section 3.2). For each tactic in a generated valid formal proof, we insert the tactic state returned by the verifier as a comment "/- tactic state: … -/". During training, we use all tokens following "/- tactic state: " as responses to calculate the supervised fine-tuning loss, while the tokens before this comment is used as prompts and do not contribute to the training loss calculation.
items.zh: 为了实现蒙特卡洛树搜索的截断-恢复机制，我们需要从模型生成的代码中提取策略信息。我们使用 LeanDojo（Yang 等人，2023）项目的数据提取工具增强了 Lean REPL（读取-求值-打印循环；Leanprover Community，2023）。这使我们能够以三元组形式提取策略信息，包括每个策略的位置，以及应用前后的策略状态。这些信息帮助我们识别触发验证错误的特定策略代码（用于树搜索的扩展步骤，见第 3.2 节）。对于生成的每个有效形式证明中的策略，我们将验证器返回的策略状态作为注释 "/- tactic state: … -/" 插入。在训练期间，我们使用 "/- tactic state: " 之后的所有标记作为响应来计算监督微调损失，而此注释之前的标记用作提示，不参与训练损失计算。

items.en: We conduct supervised fine-tuning based on the pre-trained model and train for 9B tokens, using a batch size of 2,048 and a constant learning rate of 1e-4. The training process begins with 100 warm-up steps to stabilize the learning dynamics. Training examples are randomly concatenated to form sequences, with a maximum context length of 4,096 tokens.
items.zh: 我们基于预训练模型进行监督微调，训练了 90 亿个标记，使用批次大小 2048 和恒定学习率 1e-4。训练过程从 100 步预热开始，以稳定学习动态。训练示例被随机拼接成序列，最大上下文长度为 4096 个标记。

full.sec: 2.3 Reinforcement Learning from Proof Assistant Feedback
full.secZh: 2.3 基于证明助手反馈的强化学习

items.en: Reinforcement learning (RL) has been proven effective in enhancing the mathematical reasoning capabilities of supervised fine-tuned language models (Shao et al., 2024). To further advance DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-SFT, we incorporate a reinforcement learning phase, resulting in the model DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-RL. This phase leverages RL to enhance performance based on verification feedback from the Lean 4 prover. The specifics of this RL process are detailed below.
items.zh: 强化学习已被证明能有效提升监督微调语言模型的数学推理能力（Shao et al., 2024）。为进一步改进DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-SFT，我们引入强化学习阶段，得到模型DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-RL。该阶段利用强化学习，基于Lean 4证明器的验证反馈来提升性能。该强化学习过程的细节如下所述。

items.en: In the reinforcement learning stage, we use a subset of theorem statements from the supervised fine-tuning dataset as training prompts. We select theorems for which DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-SFT has a moderate success rate in generating correct proofs upon multiple attempts. This ensures that the model has room for improvement while still being able to receive positive feedback. After filtering, we retain approximately 4.5k unique theorem statements. Each theorem is prefixed with both CoT and non-CoT guiding prompts to enhance the model’s proof generation capabilities in both modes.
items.zh: 在强化学习阶段，我们使用监督微调数据集中定理陈述的子集作为训练提示。我们选择那些DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-SFT在多次尝试中生成正确证明的成功率适中的定理。这确保了模型有改进空间，同时仍能获得正面反馈。经过筛选，我们保留了约4500个独特的定理陈述。每个定理都附有思维链和非思维链引导提示，以增强模型在两种模式下的证明生成能力。

items.en: When training LLMs via RL, a trained reward model typically provides feedback signals. In contrast, formal theorem proving benefits from the rigorous verification of generated proofs by proof assistants, offering a significant advantage. Specifically, each generated proof receives a reward of 1 if verified as correct, and 0 otherwise. While this binary reward signal is accurate, it is also sparse, especially for theorems that are challenging for the supervised fine-tuned model. To mitigate this sparsity, we select training prompts that are challenging yet achievable for the supervised fine-tuned model, as described above.
items.zh: 通过强化学习训练大语言模型时，通常使用训练好的奖励模型提供反馈信号。相比之下，形式定理证明得益于证明助手对生成证明的严格验证，具有显著优势。具体来说，每个生成的证明如果被验证为正确，则获得奖励1，否则为0。虽然这种二元奖励信号是准确的，但它也很稀疏，特别是对于监督微调模型难以处理的定理。为缓解稀疏性问题，我们如上所述选择那些对监督微调模型具有挑战性但可实现的训练提示。

items.en: We employ the Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO; Shao et al., 2024) as our RL algorithm, which has demonstrated superior effectiveness and efficiency compared to PPO (Schulman et al., 2017), primarily because it eliminates the necessity of training an additional critic model. Specifically, GRPO samples a group of candidate proofs for each theorem prompt and optimizes the model based on the relative rewards of the outputs within the group. Our prompt selection strategy is designed to likely include both correct and incorrect proofs among the candidates, aligning well with the group-relative nature of GRPO and thereby enhancing the training process.
items.zh: 我们采用组相对策略优化（GRPO；Shao et al., 2024）作为强化学习算法，该算法相比PPO（Schulman et al., 2017）表现出更优的效果和效率，主要因为它无需训练额外的评论家模型。具体而言，GRPO为每个定理提示采样一组候选证明，并根据组内输出的相对奖励优化模型。我们的提示选择策略旨在使候选证明中可能同时包含正确和错误的证明，这与GRPO的组相对性质相契合，从而增强训练过程。

items.en: We conduct RL training based on the SFT model, which serves as both the initial model and the reference model for imposing the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence penalty. We use a constant learning rate of 5e-6, and the KL penalty coefficient is set to 0.02. For each theorem, we sample a group of 32 candidate proofs, with maximum length set to 2,048. The training batch size is configured to 512.
items.zh: 我们基于SFT模型进行强化学习训练，该模型同时作为初始模型和用于施加KL散度惩罚的参考模型。我们使用恒定的学习率5e-6，KL惩罚系数设为0.02。对于每个定理，我们采样一组32个候选证明，最大长度设为2048。训练批次大小配置为512。

items.en: We evaluate theorem-proving performance on the following benchmarks to compare model capabilities after each training stage:
items.zh: 我们在以下基准上评估定理证明性能，以比较每个训练阶段后的模型能力：

items.en: MiniF2F (Zheng et al., 2022) focuses on formal problem-solving skills for high-school level exercises and competitions, such as AMC, AIME, and IMO, with an emphasis on algebra and number theory. The benchmark includes 244 validation and 244 test problems, originally in Lean 3 and manually converted to Lean 4.9.0, based on the version provided by Yang (2023).
items.zh: MiniF2F（Zheng et al., 2022）专注于高中水平习题和竞赛（如AMC、AIME和IMO）的形式化问题求解能力，重点在代数和数论。该基准包含244个验证问题和244个测试问题，最初基于Lean 3，后根据Yang（2023）提供的版本手动转换为Lean 4.9.0。

items.en: ProofNet (Azerbayev et al., 2023) evaluates formal theorem-proving capabilities at the undergraduate level in mathematics. It comprises 185 validation and 186 test problems from widely-used undergraduate textbooks, covering real and complex analysis, linear algebra, abstract algebra, and topology. These problems were initially in Lean 3 and manually converted to Lean 4.9.0.
items.zh: ProofNet（Azerbayev et al., 2023）评估本科数学水平的形式定理证明能力。它包含185个验证问题和186个测试问题，来自广泛使用的本科教材，涵盖实分析与复分析、线性代数、抽象代数和拓扑学。这些问题最初基于Lean 3，后手动转换为Lean 4.9.0。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Comparison of model capabilities at different training stages. "CoT" and "non-CoT" refer to evaluations using two guiding prompts. The shaded region represents the range of standard deviations around the mean values. The notation μ±σplus-or-minus𝜇𝜎\mu\pm\sigma indicates the average accuracy μ𝜇\mu and the standard deviation σ𝜎\sigma.
items.capZh: 图3：不同训练阶段模型能力的比较。“CoT”和“non-CoT”指使用两种引导提示的评估。阴影区域表示均值周围的标准差范围。符号μ±σ表示平均准确率μ和标准差σ。

items.en: For each proof attempt of DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-Base, we independently sample three proof demonstrations from the validation set to construct the few-shot prompts. For the miniF2F benchmark, we use human-written proofs from Yang (2023), while for the ProofNet benchmark, we use correct proofs generated by DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-RL as few-shot demonstrations. For DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-SFT and DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-RL, we employ two types of guiding prompts: one that encourages chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning before each proof step, and one that does not (non-CoT). Detailed examples are provided in Appendix A.
items.zh: 对于DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-Base的每次证明尝试，我们独立从验证集中采样三个证明示例以构建少样本提示。对于miniF2F基准，我们使用Yang（2023）中人工编写的证明；对于ProofNet基准，我们使用DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-RL生成的正确证明作为少样本示例。对于DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-SFT和DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-RL，我们使用两种类型的引导提示：一种鼓励在每个证明步骤前进行思维链推理，另一种则不。详细示例见附录A。

items.en: We evaluate theorem-proving performance using the pass@K𝐾K accuracy metric, which measures the model’s success in generating a correct proof within K𝐾K attempts. Each model is deployed on a single A100-40G GPU, utilizing the vLLM framework (Kwon et al., 2023) for sample generation. The sampling parameters are set with a temperature of 1, a top-p value of 0.95, and a maximum token limit of 2,048. The generated proofs are then verified using the Lean 4 theorem prover. For this verification, we import Mathlib4 (Mathlib Community, 2020) and Aesop (Limperg and From, 2023) to access predefined premises and tactics. The verification process is subject to a time limit of 300 seconds.
items.zh: 我们使用pass@K准确率指标评估定理证明性能，该指标衡量模型在K次尝试内生成正确证明的成功率。每个模型部署在单个A100-40G GPU上，使用vLLM框架（Kwon et al., 2023）进行样本生成。采样参数设置为温度1、top-p值0.95、最大token限制2048。生成的证明随后使用Lean 4定理证明器进行验证。为此，我们导入Mathlib4（Mathlib Community, 2020）和Aesop（Limperg and From, 2023）以访问预定义前提和策略。验证过程受300秒时间限制。

items.en: We compare the performance of non-CoT and CoT generation modes for both DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-SFT and DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-RL. The results in Figure 3 demonstrate that the CoT mode consistently outperforms the non-CoT mode across most settings. Specifically, DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-RL, leveraging these enhanced theorem-proving patterns, achieves superior performance on both benchmarks, with an average accuracy of 51.6%percent51.651.6\% on miniF2F and 18.2%percent18.218.2\% on ProofNet. The integration of natural language reasoning in CoT mode significantly enhances the planning and execution of formal proof writing. For a detailed comparison of proof strategies with and without the use of natural language chain-of-thought, refer to the examples provided in Appendix A.
items.zh: 我们比较了DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-SFT和DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-RL在非思维链和思维链生成模式下的性能。图3中的结果表明，思维链模式在大多数设置下始终优于非思维链模式。具体而言，DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-RL利用这些增强的定理证明模式，在两个基准上均取得了优越性能，在miniF2F上平均准确率为51.6%，在ProofNet上为18.2%。思维链模式中自然语言推理的集成显著增强了形式证明编写的规划和执行。关于使用和不使用自然语言思维链的证明策略的详细比较，请参考附录A中的示例。

items.en: To implement the tree search method in the whole-proof generation setting, we introduce a proof tree abstraction to define the tailored state and action space, leveraging a truncate-and-resume mechanism. Roughly following the paradigm of Yao et al. (2023), we begin by decomposing an incomplete proof into a sequence of tree nodes that correspond to individual proof steps, and then we utilize the partial content stored in these tree nodes to continue the proof generation process. Figure 4 illustrates the process of constructing a proof search tree from whole-proof generation.
items.zh: 为了在整证明生成设置中实现树搜索方法，我们引入了一个证明树抽象来定义定制的状态和动作空间，利用截断-恢复机制。大致遵循Yao et al.（2023）的范式，我们首先将不完整的证明分解为对应于单个证明步骤的树节点序列，然后利用这些树节点中存储的部分内容继续证明生成过程。图4展示了从整证明生成构建证明搜索树的过程。

items.en: We construct the proof search tree at the tactic level, where each tree edge represents a single transition step of the tactic state. Initially, we submit the entire proof the model generated to the Lean prover to parse it into tactics. We then truncate the proof at the earliest verification error, ensuring that all subsequent tactic codes can be successfully applied to advance the proof towards the desired theorem. The tactic codes are segmented into several code fractions, each containing a valid tactic code and its associated chain-of-thought comments, corresponding to a single tree edge that represents a tactic state transition. Through this abstraction, each tactic code is converted into a series of tree nodes, forming a path from the root to a specific node.
items.zh: 我们在策略级别构建证明搜索树，其中每个树边代表策略状态的一个转移步骤。最初，我们将模型生成的整个证明提交给Lean证明器以解析为策略。然后，我们在最早的验证错误处截断证明，确保所有后续策略代码都能成功应用以推进证明朝向目标定理。策略代码被分割成若干代码片段，每个片段包含一个有效的策略代码及其相关的思维链注释，对应于代表策略状态转移的单个树边。通过这种抽象，每个策略代码被转换为一系列树节点，形成从根到特定节点的路径。

items.en: In Lean 4, different tactics can lead to the same tactic state, meaning each node in our proof tree can correspond to various tactic codes that achieve the same outcome. To handle this, we store a set of these equivalent tactic codes at each node. When the tree search agent expands a node, it randomly selects one tactic to use as a prompt for the language model. This prompt includes the incomplete proof code ending with the chosen tactic and the tactic state information from the Lean prover as a comment block. The fine-tuned model (see Section 2.2) has been trained to recognize and utilize this format, using the incomplete code augmented with tactic state comments to guide subsequent proof generation.
items.zh: 在Lean 4中，不同的策略可能导致相同的策略状态，这意味着我们证明树中的每个节点可以对应多个实现相同结果的策略代码。为处理这种情况，我们在每个节点存储一组这些等价的策略代码。当树搜索智能体扩展一个节点时，它随机选择一个策略作为语言模型的提示。该提示包括以所选策略结尾的不完整证明代码，以及来自Lean证明器的策略状态信息作为注释块。微调后的模型（见第2.2节）已训练识别并利用这种格式，使用带有策略状态注释的不完整代码来指导后续证明生成。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Truncate-and-Resume Mechanism in the Expansion Step of MCTS. (a) After selecting a node, we trace its corresponding incomplete proof code prefix, which includes the file header, initial statement, and successfully applied tactics from the ancestor nodes. (b) The language model then generates the subsequent proof based on this prefix along with a comment block containing the current tactic state. (c) The combined proof code (prefix and newly generated code) is verified by the Lean 4 prover. If no errors are found, the tree-search procedure terminates. If errors are detected, we truncate the newly generated code at the first error message, discard the subsequent code, and parse the successful portion into tactics. (d) Each tactic is added as a new node in the search tree, extending a chain of descendants beneath the selected node. (e) Once the tree updates are complete, the next iteration of expansion begins by selecting an alternative candidate node, which is not limited to leaf nodes. This process repeats until a correct proof is found or the sample budget is exhausted.
items.capZh: 图4：MCTS扩展步骤中的截断-恢复机制。(a) 选择节点后，我们追踪其对应的不完整证明代码前缀，包括文件头、初始陈述和来自祖先节点的成功应用的策略。(b) 语言模型随后基于该前缀以及包含当前策略状态的注释块生成后续证明。(c) 组合后的证明代码（前缀和新生成的代码）由Lean 4证明器验证。如果未发现错误，树搜索过程终止。如果检测到错误，我们在第一个错误消息处截断新生成的代码，丢弃后续代码，并将成功部分解析为策略。(d) 每个策略作为新节点添加到搜索树中，在选择节点下延伸出一系列后代节点。(e) 树更新完成后，下一轮扩展开始，选择另一个候选节点（不限于叶节点）。此过程重复，直到找到正确证明或样本预算耗尽。

full.sec: 3.2 Interactive Theorem Proving via Monte-Carlo Tree Search
full.secZh: 3.2 基于蒙特卡洛树搜索的交互式定理证明

items.en: Our proof search tree is developed using the standard Monte-Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) paradigm (MCTS; Coulom, 2006; Browne et al., 2012), which iteratively applies four steps: Selection, Expansion, Simulation, and Backpropagation. We integrate the Simulation step into Expansion because our whole-proof generation model inherently performs a rollout from the expanded node. The detailed design of the algorithm workflow is as follows.
items.zh: 我们的证明搜索树使用标准的蒙特卡洛树搜索范式（MCTS；Coulom, 2006；Browne et al., 2012）开发，该范式迭代应用四个步骤：选择、扩展、模拟和反向传播。我们将模拟步骤整合到扩展中，因为我们的整证明生成模型本质上从扩展节点执行了一次展开。算法工作流程的详细设计如下。

items.en: The selection step, a.k.a.the tree policy, starts from the root node and traverses downward to identify a promising node for expansion. The objective of this algorithmic step is to trade off between exploration and exploitation (Kocsis and Szepesvári, 2006). The tree policy at a tree node s𝑠s is computed by selecting the action that maximizes the value from the set of valid operations:
items.zh: 选择步骤（即树策略）从根节点开始，向下遍历以识别一个用于扩展的有前途的节点。该算法步骤的目标是在探索和利用之间进行权衡（Kocsis and Szepesvári, 2006）。树节点s处的树策略通过从有效操作集中选择最大化值的动作来计算：

items.en: where the action a𝑎a can be either moving to a child node, denoted by a∈C​h​i​l​d​r​e​n​(s)𝑎𝐶ℎ𝑖𝑙𝑑𝑟𝑒𝑛𝑠a\in Children(s), or expanding the current node s𝑠s, denoted by a special token a=⊘𝑎⊘a=\oslash. This approach uses a technique called virtual node (Wang et al., 2023b), which assigns each node an imaginary child to represent the selection of the current node s𝑠s for expansion. It enables the tree search agent to continually expand non-leaf nodes, as the action space is supported by a generative model whose output scope cannot be determined by a fixed number of trails. The value estimation QU​C​B​(s,a)subscript𝑄𝑈𝐶𝐵𝑠𝑎Q_{UCB}(s,a) of performing action a𝑎a on node s𝑠s is composed by two components:
items.zh: 其中动作a可以是移动到子节点（记为a∈Children(s)），或扩展当前节点s（记为特殊标记a=⊘）。这种方法使用一种称为虚拟节点的技术（Wang et al., 2023b），为每个节点分配一个虚拟子节点来表示选择当前节点s进行扩展。它使树搜索智能体能够持续扩展非叶节点，因为动作空间由生成模型支持，其输出范围无法由固定数量的试验确定。在节点s上执行动作a的价值估计QUCB(s,a)由两个部分组成：

items.en: where Q​(s,a)𝑄𝑠𝑎Q(s,a) denotes a sample-based estimation of action values derived from the selection history, functioning as the exploitation component that retrieves high-value candidates from previous trials. U​C​B​(s,a)𝑈𝐶𝐵𝑠𝑎UCB(s,a) denotes the exploration bonus computed by upper confidence bounds (UCB; Auer, 2002), which diminishes with the repeated execution of the state-action pair (s,a)𝑠𝑎(s,a). More specifically, QU​C​B​(s,a)subscript𝑄𝑈𝐶𝐵𝑠𝑎Q_{UCB}(s,a) stands for an optimistic estimation of Q​(s,a)𝑄𝑠𝑎Q(s,a) and can serve as an upper bound with high probability. We defer the discussion of detailed settings of node values and UCB bonus to Section 3.3.
items.zh: 其中Q(s,a)表示基于选择历史得出的动作价值的样本估计，作为利用组件，从先前试验中检索高价值候选。UCB(s,a)表示通过上置信界（UCB；Auer, 2002）计算的探索奖励，随着状态-动作对(s,a)的重复执行而减小。更具体地说，QUCB(s,a)是Q(s,a)的乐观估计，可以高概率作为上界。我们将节点值和UCB奖励的详细设置讨论推迟到第3.3节。

items.en: The next step is invoking the proof generation model to expand the node nominated by the selection phase. Resuming the incomplete proof codes stored on the node designated for expansion, we perform whole-proof generation to propose a series of subsequent tactics and submit the generated proof to Lean prover for verification. Such a trial of proof completion is equivalent to conducting a single rollout of simulation within the standard MCTS framework. When the verification result indicates the proof is complete, the search procedure is ready to be terminated, having found a new proof of the desired theorem. Otherwise, we parse the verification feedback and truncate the generated proof to the assertion of the earliest verification error. The remaining tactics are transformed into a path of nodes to be merged into the search tree (see Figure 4). It is important to note that, because we use the whole-proof generation setting—where the output is an entire proof consisting of a sequence of tactics, rather than just the next tactic—our expansion procedure may insert a path of tree nodes into the search tree during each iteration. This differs from the conventional MCTS designed for competitive games, which typically expands only one layer of children nodes per iteration (Silver et al., 2016, 2018; Schrittwieser et al., 2020).
items.zh: 下一步是调用证明生成模型来扩展由选择阶段选定的节点。恢复存储在待扩展节点上的不完整证明代码，我们执行全证明生成以提出一系列后续策略，并将生成的证明提交给 Lean 验证器进行验证。这种证明完成的尝试相当于在标准 MCTS 框架内执行单次模拟展开。当验证结果表明证明已完成时，搜索过程即可终止，从而找到所需定理的新证明。否则，我们解析验证反馈，并将生成的证明截断到最早验证错误的断言处。剩余的策略被转换为一条节点路径，合并到搜索树中（见图 4）。需要注意的是，由于我们使用全证明生成设置（输出是由一系列策略组成的完整证明，而不仅仅是下一个策略），我们的扩展过程每次迭代可能会向搜索树插入一条节点路径。这与为竞技游戏设计的传统 MCTS 不同，后者每次迭代通常只扩展一层子节点（Silver 等人，2016，2018；Schrittwieser 等人，2020）。

items.en: The final phase of each tree search iteration is to update value statistics along the selection trajectory from the root to the expanded node, i.e., updating the values associated with the tree policy stated in Eq. (1). Let τ={(r​o​o​t,s(1)),(s(1),s(2)),(s(2),s(3)),…,(s(|τ|−1)=st,⊘)}𝜏𝑟𝑜𝑜𝑡superscript𝑠1superscript𝑠1superscript𝑠2superscript𝑠2superscript𝑠3…superscript𝑠𝜏1subscript𝑠𝑡⊘\tau=\{(root,s^{(1)}),(s^{(1)},s^{(2)}),(s^{(2)},s^{(3)}),\dots,(s^{(|\tau|-1)}=s_{t},\oslash)\} denote the selection trajectory of t𝑡t-th iteration that ends with stsubscript𝑠𝑡s_{t} as the expanding node. We update QU​C​B​(s,a)subscript𝑄𝑈𝐶𝐵𝑠𝑎Q_{UCB}(s,a) for all (s,a)∈τ𝑠𝑎𝜏(s,a)\in\tau by taking the most recent trajectory reward R​(τ)𝑅𝜏R(\tau) into account (details refer to Eq. (7)). The extrinsic source of rewards comes from the compiler feedback, specifically assigning a reward of Rextrinsic​(τ)=1subscript𝑅extrinsic𝜏1R_{\text{extrinsic}}(\tau)=1 for completed proofs and Rextrinsic​(τ)=0subscript𝑅extrinsic𝜏0R_{\text{extrinsic}}(\tau)=0 for unsolved ones. In Section 3.3, we will introduce an intrinsic reward mechanism to augment the reward assignment that enhances the agent’s incentive for exploration.
items.zh: 每次树搜索迭代的最后阶段是更新从根节点到扩展节点的选择轨迹上的值统计量，即更新与公式 (1) 中树策略相关的值。令 τ={(root,s(1)),(s(1),s(2)),(s(2),s(3)),…,(s(|τ|-1)=st,⊘)} 表示第 t 次迭代的选择轨迹，以 st 作为扩展节点结束。我们通过考虑最近的轨迹奖励 R(τ) 来更新所有 (s,a)∈τ 的 QU CB(s,a)（详情见公式 (7)）。奖励的外部来源来自编译器反馈，具体地，为完成的证明分配奖励 Rextrinsic(τ)=1，为未解决的证明分配 Rextrinsic(τ)=0。在第 3.3 节中，我们将引入一种内在奖励机制来增强奖励分配，从而提高智能体的探索动机。

full.sec: 3.3 Intrinsic Rewards for Monte-Carlo Tree Search
full.secZh: 3.3 蒙特卡洛树搜索的内在奖励

items.en: In the search problem of formal theorem proving, the extrinsic rewards are extremely sparse, i.e., the search agent only obtains non-zero rewards when the proof is completely solved. More specifically, the proof search process forms a tree structure with only a narrow set of leaves delivering non-zero rewards, which matches a famous hard-exploration case (Krishnamurthy et al., 2016) in the literature of statistical reinforcement learning. To promote exploration in sparse-reward sequential decision making, one classical paradigm is constructing intrinsic rewards (Schmidhuber, 2010) that encourage the agent to not only optimize extrinsic rewards but also acquire general information about the interactive environment (Bellemare et al., 2016; Houthooft et al., 2016; Pathak et al., 2017; Burda et al., 2019). In this section, we present our intrinsic-reward-driven exploration algorithm, RMax applied to Tree Search (RMaxTS), to incorporate reward-free exploration in the proof search problem.
items.zh: 在形式定理证明的搜索问题中，外部奖励极其稀疏，即搜索智能体仅在证明完全解决时获得非零奖励。更具体地说，证明搜索过程形成一棵树结构，只有少数叶子节点提供非零奖励，这符合统计强化学习文献中著名的困难探索案例（Krishnamurthy 等人，2016）。为了在稀疏奖励的序列决策中促进探索，一种经典范式是构建内在奖励（Schmidhuber，2010），鼓励智能体不仅优化外部奖励，还获取关于交互环境的通用信息（Bellemare 等人，2016；Houthooft 等人，2016；Pathak 等人，2017；Burda 等人，2019）。在本节中，我们提出基于内在奖励驱动的探索算法 RMax 应用于树搜索（RMaxTS），将无奖励探索融入证明搜索问题。

items.en: We adopt RMax (Brafman and Tennenholtz, 2002), a classical exploration mechanism, to construct intrinsic rewards for Monte-Carlo tree search. The core idea of RMax is to explore a broad coverage of the state space. The agent awards itself a maximal amount of reward upon reaching an unseen state. In the context of proof search, where no extrinsic rewards are provided until the proof is completed, our algorithmic procedure resembles ZeroRMax (Jin et al., 2020), in which the agent’s exploration is driven solely by intrinsic rewards, i.e., setting R​(τ)=Rintrinsic​(τ)𝑅𝜏subscript𝑅intrinsic𝜏R(\tau)=R_{\text{intrinsic}}(\tau). The intrinsic reward of a tree expansion step is determined by whether a new node is added to the search tree,
items.zh: 我们采用 RMax（Brafman 和 Tennenholtz，2002），一种经典的探索机制，为蒙特卡洛树搜索构建内在奖励。RMax 的核心思想是探索状态空间的广泛覆盖。智能体在到达未见过的状态时，会给自己分配最大量的奖励。在证明搜索的背景下，直到证明完成才提供外部奖励，我们的算法过程类似于 ZeroRMax（Jin 等人，2020），其中智能体的探索仅由内在奖励驱动，即设置 R(τ)=Rintrinsic(τ)。树扩展步骤的内在奖励取决于是否向搜索树添加了新节点，

items.tex: \displaystyle R_{\text{intrinsic}}(\tau)=\mathbb{I}\left[\text{at least one new node is added to the search tree}\right],

items.en: where τ𝜏\tau denotes the most recent selection trajectory that requires a reward assignment for backpropagation. This exploration strategy prioritizes the expansion of nodes where the prover model generates tactics that lead to a diverse range of tactic states. As multiple Lean codes can result in the same transition of intermediate states, this heuristics can potentially reduce redundant generation and improve sample efficiency.
items.zh: 其中 τ 表示最近的选择轨迹，需要为其分配奖励以进行反向传播。这种探索策略优先扩展那些证明模型生成的策略导致多样化策略状态的节点。由于多个 Lean 代码可能导致相同的中间状态转换，这种启发式方法可能减少冗余生成并提高样本效率。

items.en: The common setting of UCB exploration bonus for Monte-Carlo tree search is using UCB1 (Auer et al., 2002):
items.zh: 蒙特卡洛树搜索的 UCB 探索奖励的常见设置是使用 UCB1（Auer 等人，2002）：

items.en: where Γ​(s,a)={τ∣(s,a)∈τ}Γ𝑠𝑎conditional-set𝜏𝑠𝑎𝜏\Gamma(s,a)=\{\tau\mid(s,a)\in\tau\} denotes the list of tree-policy trajectory τ𝜏\tau containing (s,a)𝑠𝑎(s,a) as an intermediate selection step. To facilitate discussions, we organize the list Γ​(s,a)={τ1,τ2,⋯}Γ𝑠𝑎subscript𝜏1subscript𝜏2⋯\Gamma(s,a)=\{\tau_{1},\tau_{2},\cdots\} such that newly collected trajectories have larger subscript indices. In this work, we propose to use an alternative variant of UCB method. Note that the derived intrinsic reward in Eq. (3) is a non-stationary reward signal whose expected value decays with the progress of exploration. That is because it becomes definitely harder to discover new nodes with unseen tactic states as the search tree expands through sophisticated exploration. To tackle the non-stationarity, we consider discounted upper confidence bounds (DUCB; Garivier and Moulines, 2011), which uses a discount factor γ∈(0,1)𝛾01\gamma\in(0,1) to smoothly drop those outdated feedback records:
items.zh: 其中 Γ(s,a)={τ∣(s,a)∈τ} 表示包含 (s,a) 作为中间选择步骤的树策略轨迹 τ 的列表。为便于讨论，我们将列表 Γ(s,a)={τ1,τ2,⋯} 组织起来，使得新收集的轨迹具有更大的下标索引。在这项工作中，我们提出使用 UCB 方法的另一种变体。注意，公式 (3) 中导出的内在奖励是一种非平稳的奖励信号，其期望值随着探索的进展而衰减。这是因为随着搜索树通过复杂的探索扩展，发现具有未见策略状态的新节点变得更加困难。为了处理非平稳性，我们考虑折扣上置信界（DUCB；Garivier 和 Moulines，2011），它使用折扣因子 γ∈(0,1) 来平滑地丢弃过时的反馈记录：

items.en: where newly received feedback would be assigned a larger weight in the value estimation. In practice, we set γ=0.99𝛾0.99\gamma=0.99. Note that the role of discount factor γ𝛾\gamma in DUCB differs from its role in value iteration for infinite-horizon MDPs. The discounting is applied to tree search iterations rather than to the action-step horizon within a single trajectory.
items.zh: 其中新收到的反馈在值估计中被赋予更大的权重。在实践中，我们设置 γ=0.99。注意，DUCB 中折扣因子 γ 的作用不同于其在无限时域 MDP 的值迭代中的作用。折扣应用于树搜索迭代，而不是单个轨迹内的动作步长时域。

full.secZh: 3.4 蒙特卡洛树搜索的并行化

items.en: To enhance the efficiency of Monte-Carlo Tree Search (MCTS), we implement several established parallelization techniques as described by Chaslot et al. (2008).
items.zh: 为了提高蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）的效率，我们实现了 Chaslot 等人（2008）描述的几种成熟的并行化技术。

items.en: Root Parallelization: We deploy 256 MCTS runners per node, with one language model per GPU and a batch size of 512 for proof generation. The Lean prover is invoked through REPL and executed on a cluster with thousands of CPU cores, where each proof verification task is handled by an individual process, created and terminated in a sandbox. Both proof generation by language models and verification by Lean provers are handled asynchronously. This setup allows MCTS runners to perform concurrent tree search operations, significantly accelerating the process.
items.zh: 根并行化：我们在每个节点部署 256 个 MCTS 运行器，每个 GPU 一个语言模型，证明生成的批大小为 512。Lean 验证器通过 REPL 调用，并在具有数千个 CPU 核心的集群上执行，每个证明验证任务由单个进程处理，在沙箱中创建和终止。语言模型的证明生成和 Lean 验证器的验证都是异步处理的。这种设置允许 MCTS 运行器执行并发树搜索操作，显著加速了过程。

items.en: Tree Parallelization: We manage each search tree with 32 thread workers to parallelize the tree iteration steps. This method effectively schedules and balances the tasks of proof generation and Lean verification. Each thread worker iteratively performs the tree search loop by selecting a candidate node for expansion, invoking the language model to generate the proof, verifying the generated proof with the Lean prover, and performing backpropagation.
items.zh: 树并行化：我们使用 32 个线程工作者管理每个搜索树，以并行化树迭代步骤。这种方法有效地调度和平衡了证明生成和 Lean 验证的任务。每个线程工作者通过选择候选节点进行扩展、调用语言模型生成证明、用 Lean 验证器验证生成的证明以及执行反向传播，迭代地执行树搜索循环。

items.en: Virtual Loss: To encourage diverse node selection among concurrent thread workers, we assign a virtual reward R​(τ)=0𝑅𝜏0R(\tau)=0 for ongoing iterations. This involves backpropagating a reward of 00 temporarily and updating it to the true reward upon completion. This strategy promotes exploration of different nodes for expansion, thereby enhancing the overall search efficiency.
items.zh: 虚拟损失：为了鼓励并发线程工作者之间的多样化节点选择，我们为正在进行的迭代分配虚拟奖励 R(τ)=0。这涉及暂时反向传播奖励 0，并在完成时更新为真实奖励。这种策略促进了不同节点的扩展探索，从而提高了整体搜索效率。

items.en: In this section, we compare our proposed proof tree search method, which introduces a novel truncate-and-resume mechanism for whole-proof generation, with existing approaches. Current methods for using language models in formal mathematics proof search generally fall into two main strategies:
items.zh: 在本节中，我们将我们提出的证明树搜索方法（引入了新颖的截断-恢复机制用于全证明生成）与现有方法进行比较。当前在形式数学证明搜索中使用语言模型的方法通常分为两种主要策略：

items.en: Multi-pass proof-step generation: This strategy breaks down the proving process into multiple episodes of tactic generation and verification, typically following a tree search pattern. It involves generating and verifying one tactic at a time, repeating the process for the next tactic until no proof goals remain. Notable examples include GPT-f (Polu and Sutskever, 2020; Polu et al., 2022), Thor (Jiang et al., 2022a), ReProver (Yang et al., 2023), Hypertree Proof Search (Lample et al., 2022), and InternLM2-StepProver (Wu et al., 2024).
items.zh: 多遍证明步骤生成：这种策略将证明过程分解为多个策略生成和验证的回合，通常遵循树搜索模式。它涉及一次生成和验证一个策略，重复该过程直到没有证明目标剩余。著名的例子包括 GPT-f（Polu 和 Sutskever，2020；Polu 等人，2022）、Thor（Jiang 等人，2022a）、ReProver（Yang 等人，2023）、Hypertree Proof Search（Lample 等人，2022）和 InternLM2-StepProver（Wu 等人，2024）。

items.en: Single-pass whole-proof generation: This approach generates and verify an entire proof in one attempt. If the proof is incorrect, the model generates a new proof in the next attempt. Methods in this category include DSP (Jiang et al., 2022b), Subgoal-Prover Zhao et al. (2023), LEGO-Prover (Wang et al., 2023a), Lyra (Zheng et al., 2023), and miniCTX (Hu et al., 2024).
items.zh: 单遍全证明生成：这种方法一次性生成并验证整个证明。如果证明不正确，模型会在下一次尝试中生成新的证明。此类方法包括 DSP（Jiang 等人，2022b）、Subgoal-Prover（Zhao 等人，2023）、LEGO-Prover（Wang 等人，2023a）、Lyra（Zheng 等人，2023）和 miniCTX（Hu 等人，2024）。

items.en: Our proof tree search method uniquely bridges these two strategies, offering a novel hybrid approach. It starts with whole-proof generation, similar to the single-pass approach, but extends this by implementing a sophisticated truncate-and-resume mechanism. This process involves truncating the generated proof to its successful initial segment, parsing this segment into individual tactics, and resuming the tree search from this point. This iterative process effectively implements a Monte-Carlo Tree Search, seamlessly integrating single-pass whole-proof generation with multi-pass proof-step generation. Consequently, we can train a single model with nearly identical objectives to support both strategies simultaneously. Our experimental results demonstrate that this unified approach achieves superior performance in both settings. By combining the strengths of existing methods and introducing innovative techniques, our method offers a more versatile and effective solution for formal mathematics proof search, potentially paving the way for future advancements in this field.
items.zh: 我们的证明树搜索方法独特地桥接了这两种策略，提供了一种新颖的混合方法。它从全证明生成开始，类似于单遍方法，但通过实现复杂的截断-恢复机制进行了扩展。该过程涉及将生成的证明截断到其成功的初始段，将该段解析为单个策略，并从该点恢复树搜索。这个迭代过程有效地实现了蒙特卡洛树搜索，无缝集成了单遍全证明生成和多遍证明步骤生成。因此，我们可以使用几乎相同的目标训练单个模型，同时支持两种策略。我们的实验结果表明，这种统一方法在两种设置下都实现了优越的性能。通过结合现有方法的优势并引入创新技术，我们的方法为形式数学证明搜索提供了更通用和有效的解决方案，可能为该领域的未来进展铺平道路。

items.en: In this section, we evaluate the theorem-proving capabilities of DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 using two distinct benchmarks: miniF2F, which encompasses high-school level exercises and competition problems, and ProofNet, which pertains to undergraduate-level theorems. We present the results for both complete proof generation and Monte-Carlo tree search methodologies, utilizing the same trained model and inference configuration as Section 2.4 to ensure consistency.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们使用两个不同的基准评估 DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 的定理证明能力：miniF2F（包含高中水平的习题和竞赛问题）和 ProofNet（涉及本科水平的定理）。我们展示了完整证明生成和蒙特卡洛树搜索方法的结果，使用与第 2.4 节相同的训练模型和推理配置以确保一致性。

items.en: We present a comparative analysis of DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 against previous state-of-the-art language models, highlighting its performance and advancements.
items.zh: 我们提供了 DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 与先前最先进语言模型的比较分析，突出了其性能和进步。

items.en: General-purpose Models: GPT-3.5 and GPT-4 (OpenAI, 2023) are advanced generative AI models developed by OpenAI, known for their effectiveness across diverse tasks, including code generation. Despite not being specifically designed for theorem proving, their extensive parameter scales provide significant capabilities. The evaluation of these models in formal theorem proving is facilitated by COPRA (Thakur et al., 2023), an in-context learning agent that leverages these large language models to propose tactic applications. Additionally, we examine Llemma (Azerbayev et al., 2024), a series of language models trained on extensive general mathematical corpora, commonly used as the base model for formal theorem proving.
items.zh: 通用模型：GPT-3.5 和 GPT-4（OpenAI，2023）是由 OpenAI 开发的先进生成式 AI 模型，以其在包括代码生成在内的各种任务中的有效性而闻名。尽管并非专门为定理证明设计，但它们庞大的参数规模提供了显著的能力。这些模型在形式定理证明中的评估通过 COPRA（Thakur 等人，2023）实现，这是一个上下文学习智能体，利用这些大型语言模型来提出策略应用。此外，我们考察了 Llemma（Azerbayev 等人，2024），这是一系列在广泛通用数学语料库上训练的语言模型，通常用作形式定理证明的基础模型。

items.en: Specialized Models for Formal Mathematics: GPT-f (Polu and Sutskever, 2020; Polu et al., 2022) represents an initial effort to apply Transformers (Vaswani et al., 2017) to proof-step generation for theorem proving tasks, utilizing a best-first search module to construct complete proofs. Subsequent advancements include ReProver (Yang et al., 2023), LLMStep (Welleck and Saha, 2023), and Lean-STaR (Lin et al., 2024). Hypertree Proof Search (Lample et al., 2022) explores the use of Monte Carlo tree search in formal theorem proving using Lean. Concurrent works, InternLM2-Math (Ying et al., 2024b) and InternLM2-StepProver (Wu et al., 2024), also demonstrate outstanding performance.
items.zh: 形式数学专用模型：GPT-f（Polu 和 Sutskever，2020；Polu 等人，2022）代表了将 Transformer（Vaswani 等人，2017）应用于定理证明任务中证明步骤生成的初步努力，使用最佳优先搜索模块构建完整证明。后续进展包括 ReProver（Yang 等人，2023）、LLMStep（Welleck 和 Saha，2023）和 Lean-STaR（Lin 等人，2024）。Hypertree Proof Search（Lample 等人，2022）探索了在 Lean 中使用蒙特卡洛树搜索进行形式定理证明。同期工作 InternLM2-Math（Ying 等人，2024b）和 InternLM2-StepProver（Wu 等人，2024）也展示了出色的性能。

items.en: We compare the performance of DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 with state-of-the-art models using the pass@K𝐾K accuracy metric, which evaluates the model’s ability to generate a correct proof within K𝐾K attempts. We display the sample budget K𝐾K according to the the following rules to align the computation budget across different generation schemes.
items.zh: 我们使用 pass@K 准确率指标比较 DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 与最先进模型的性能，该指标评估模型在 K 次尝试内生成正确证明的能力。我们根据以下规则展示样本预算 K，以对齐不同生成方案的计算预算。

items.en: For single-pass sampling methods, we define the sample budget K𝐾K as the total number of proofs generated, with large values of K𝐾K factorized for the ease of comparison to tree search methods.
items.zh: 对于单次采样方法，我们将样本预算 K 定义为生成的证明总数，较大的 K 值被分解以便于与树搜索方法进行比较。

items.en: For best-first-search methods, following the notation of Azerbayev et al. (2024), we present K=N×S×T𝐾𝑁𝑆𝑇K=N\times S\times T where N𝑁N denotes the number of best-first-search attempts, S𝑆S denotes the number of tactics generated for each expansion, and T𝑇T denotes the number of expansion iterations.
items.zh: 对于最佳优先搜索方法，沿用 Azerbayev 等人 (2024) 的符号，我们表示为 K=N×S×T，其中 N 表示最佳优先搜索尝试次数，S 表示每次扩展生成的策略数量，T 表示扩展迭代次数。

items.en: For tree search methods, e.g., RMaxTS and HTPS (Lample et al., 2022), we present K=N×T𝐾𝑁𝑇K=N\times T where N𝑁N denotes the number of tree search attempts, and T𝑇T denotes the number of model generations invoked in tree expansions.
items.zh: 对于树搜索方法，例如 RMaxTS 和 HTPS (Lample 等人, 2022)，我们表示为 K=N×T，其中 N 表示树搜索尝试次数，T 表示树扩展中调用的模型生成次数。

full.sec: 4.2 Re-Examining the Effectiveness of Training Strategies on Large-scale Sampling
full.secZh: 4.2 重新审视训练策略在大规模采样中的有效性

items.en: We revisit the effects of several training modules in n a large-scale sampling setting, focusing on both single-pass whole-proof generation and Monte-Carlo tree search. The results demonstration that the observations and findings presented in Section 2.4 generalize to sampling scenarios with a large sample size.
items.zh: 我们在大规模采样设置中重新审视了几个训练模块的效果，重点关注单次完整证明生成和蒙特卡洛树搜索。结果表明，第 2.4 节中的观察和发现可以推广到大样本量的采样场景。

items.en: To support the claim that online reinforcement learning from verification feedback generally enhances the model capabilities, we compare our final model to the SFT-only version using a large sample budget. The comparison results are presented as two columns in Table 3. DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-RL consistently outperforms the SFT model across all generation settings, regardless of whether the chain-of-thought strategy is applied. The results also indicate that the improvements gained from conducting online RL is orthogonal to those achieved through RMaxTS, which can be further combined to boost the performance. By integrating both CoT prompting and RMaxTS, DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-RL achieves a pass rate of 62.7%percent62.762.7\% on miniF2F-test. This performance shows a notable 3.7%percent3.73.7\% improvement over the SFT model, highlighting the critical role of reinforcement learning in enhancing the overall effectiveness of the proof completion model.
items.zh: 为了支持在线强化学习从验证反馈中通常能增强模型能力的观点，我们使用大样本预算将最终模型与仅 SFT 版本进行比较。比较结果以两列形式呈现在表 3 中。DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-RL 在所有生成设置中均持续优于 SFT 模型，无论是否应用思维链策略。结果还表明，在线 RL 带来的改进与通过 RMaxTS 获得的改进是正交的，可以进一步结合以提升性能。通过整合 CoT 提示和 RMaxTS，DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-RL 在 miniF2F-test 上达到了 62.7% 的通过率。这一性能比 SFT 模型显著提高了 3.7%，凸显了强化学习在提升证明补全模型整体有效性中的关键作用。

items.en: We compare the performance of two generation modes, i.e., non-CoT and CoT, on miniF2F-test dataset. The results, shown in Table 3, indicate that the advantage of CoT over the non-CoT mode is amplified as the sample budget increases. This suggests that the incorporation of natural language chain-of-thought can diversify the planning pathways of theorem proving, potentially leading to a broader range of reasoning strategies and more innovative solutions. Results also show that these two modes have complementary advantages across different problems. The model’s theorem proving strategy in the CoT mode is more systematic and proactive in mathematical thinking, while in the non-CoT mode, the model can efficiently use Lean high-level tactics to solve computational problems that can be addressed within Lean’s automation mechanisms. To leverage these advantages, we consider a mixture strategy, denoted by non-CoT & CoT in Table 3, allocates half of sample budget to the CoT mode and the remains to the non-CoT mode. This simple combination of two guiding prompts shows great promise in further bootstrapping the performance of our proof completion model, achieving a pass rate of 63.5%percent63.563.5\% on miniF2F-test. In Appendix B, we present example problems that illustrate the different advantages of the two generation modes.
items.zh: 我们比较了两种生成模式（即非 CoT 和 CoT）在 miniF2F-test 数据集上的性能。结果如表 3 所示，表明随着样本预算的增加，CoT 相对于非 CoT 模式的优势被放大。这表明自然语言思维链的引入可以多样化定理证明的规划路径，可能带来更广泛的推理策略和更具创新性的解决方案。结果还显示，这两种模式在不同问题上具有互补优势。模型在 CoT 模式下的定理证明策略更系统化且更主动地进行数学思考，而在非 CoT 模式下，模型可以高效使用 Lean 高级策略来解决 Lean 自动化机制内可处理的计算问题。为了利用这些优势，我们考虑一种混合策略，在表 3 中记为 non-CoT & CoT，将一半样本预算分配给 CoT 模式，其余分配给非 CoT 模式。这种简单组合两种引导提示的方法在进一步提升证明补全模型性能方面显示出巨大潜力，在 miniF2F-test 上达到了 63.5% 的通过率。在附录 B 中，我们给出了示例问题，说明了两种生成模式的不同优势。

items.en: We investigate the effectiveness of two core components of RMaxTS, i.e., the intrinsic rewards defined in Eq. (3) and the discounted upper confidence bound stated in Eq. (7). We start with a baseline implementing the standard UCT algorithm (Kocsis and Szepesvári, 2006) without intrinsic rewards, in which the exploration is driven exclusively by the UCB bonus. Note that, since no non-zero rewards are provided for this baseline, all variants of the UCB formula become equivalent, as node selection is determined solely by visitation counts. The experimental results in Figure 5 show that, in the absence of intrinsic rewards, the performance of UCT (without Rintrinsicsubscript𝑅intrinsicR_{\text{intrinsic}}) degenerates into a level comparable to that of non-search methods. Furthermore, we consider RMaxTS using the standard UCB1 (refer to Eq. (4)) instead of the discounted UCB, denoted by RMaxTS (DUCB →→\rightarrow UCB1). The results indicate that the performance of RMaxTS with UCB1 bonus is also moderate, comparable to that of UCT (without Rintrinsicsubscript𝑅intrinsicR_{\text{intrinsic}}). That is because UCB1 is designed to guarantee asymptotic performance through exhausted exploration (Auer et al., 2002) assuming the sample size to be sufficiently large. In contrast, the discounted UCB can accelerate the value propagation of non-stationary intrinsic rewards, preventing the guidance of Rintrinsicsubscript𝑅intrinsicR_{\text{intrinsic}} from being dominated by that of visitation counts. This demonstrates that the discounted UCB mechanism is a crucial complement to intrinsic-reward-driven exploration.
items.zh: 我们研究了 RMaxTS 两个核心组件的有效性，即公式 (3) 中定义的内在奖励和公式 (7) 中所述的折扣上置信界。我们从实现标准 UCT 算法 (Kocsis 和 Szepesvári, 2006) 且无内在奖励的基线开始，其中探索仅由 UCB 奖励驱动。注意，由于该基线未提供非零奖励，所有 UCB 公式变体变得等价，因为节点选择仅由访问次数决定。图 5 中的实验结果表明，在缺乏内在奖励的情况下，UCT（无 R_intrinsic）的性能退化到与非搜索方法相当的水平。此外，我们考虑使用标准 UCB1（参见公式 (4)）而非折扣 UCB 的 RMaxTS，记为 RMaxTS (DUCB → UCB1)。结果表明，使用 UCB1 奖励的 RMaxTS 性能也一般，与 UCT（无 R_intrinsic）相当。这是因为 UCB1 旨在通过穷尽探索保证渐近性能 (Auer 等人, 2002)，假设样本量足够大。相比之下，折扣 UCB 可以加速非平稳内在奖励的价值传播，防止 R_intrinsic 的引导被访问次数主导。这表明折扣 UCB 机制是内在奖励驱动探索的关键补充。

items.capEn: Figure 5: A modular ablation study examining the algorithmic design of RMaxTS. The experiments are conducted on the miniF2F-test dataset with DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-RL using the CoT mode. The left panel presents the curves of Pass@K accuracy within 6400 generation samples. The results with a larger sample size are presented in the right panel.
items.capZh: 图 5：针对 RMaxTS 算法设计的模块化消融研究。实验在 miniF2F-test 数据集上使用 DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-RL 的 CoT 模式进行。左图展示了 6400 个生成样本内的 Pass@K 准确率曲线。右图展示了更大样本量的结果。

items.en: When expanding a tree node, we concatenate the intermediate tactic state information as a comment block to the incomplete code to guide the proof completion. With the provided auxiliary information, the proof completion model can enhance its internal representation of the tactic state, offering intermediate guidance for long-horizon planning. To demonstrate this advantage, we present experiments on RMaxTS that performs code completion directly from the raw incomplete code without accessing tactic state information, denoted by RMaxTS (without tactic state) in Figure 5. The results indicate that the performance gain from applying tree search becomes moderate in the absence of tactic state information, especially when tackling hard problems that require a large amount of samples. This highlights that the integration of compiler information is an essential component of the tree search algorithm, enhancing its overall effectiveness and sample efficiency.
items.zh: 在扩展树节点时，我们将中间策略状态信息作为注释块连接到不完整代码中，以指导证明补全。借助提供的辅助信息，证明补全模型可以增强其对策略状态的内部表示，为长期规划提供中间指导。为了展示这一优势，我们在图 5 中展示了直接从不完整代码进行代码补全而不访问策略状态信息的 RMaxTS 实验，记为 RMaxTS（无策略状态）。结果表明，在缺乏策略状态信息的情况下，应用树搜索带来的性能提升变得有限，尤其是在处理需要大量样本的难题时。这凸显了编译器信息的集成是树搜索算法的重要组成部分，增强了其整体有效性和样本效率。

items.en: We present DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5, a language model with 7 billion parameters that outperforms all open-source models in formal theorem proving in Lean 4. DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 is initialized with DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-Base, which extends the pre-training of DeepSeekMath-Base 7B using a specialized corpus for formal mathematical reasoning. Supervised fine-tuning is conducted on a comprehensive Lean 4 code completion dataset, encompassing a wide range of formal theorems from various mathematical domains. Subsequently, we employ GRPO to enhance whole-proof generation through online reinforcement learning. Upon developing the DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 model, we introduce RMaxTS, a variant of Monte-Carlo tree search, to improve problem-solving capabilities via large-scale search with extensive exploration. These components form a comprehensive pipeline for training an LLM-based proof assistant, enabling DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 to achieve significant improvements over DeepSeek-Prover-V1.
items.zh: 我们提出了 DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5，一个拥有 70 亿参数的语言模型，在 Lean 4 形式定理证明中优于所有开源模型。DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 以 DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5-Base 初始化，后者通过使用专门的形式数学推理语料库扩展了 DeepSeekMath-Base 7B 的预训练。监督微调在一个全面的 Lean 4 代码补全数据集上进行，涵盖了来自不同数学领域的广泛形式定理。随后，我们使用 GRPO 通过在线强化学习增强完整证明生成。在开发 DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 模型后，我们引入了 RMaxTS，一种蒙特卡洛树搜索的变体，通过大规模搜索和广泛探索来提升问题解决能力。这些组件构成了训练基于 LLM 的证明助手的完整流程，使 DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 相比 DeepSeek-Prover-V1 取得了显著改进。

items.en: The framework of DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 is designed to establish an AlphaZero-like pipeline for formal theorem proving. The use of expert iteration and synthetic data mirrors the core trial-and-error loop of reinforcement learning, with the compiler oracle serving as the world model to provide environmental supervision. Within the RL paradigm, the integrated tree search module has proven to be highly effective in advancing superhuman performance across various domains (Silver et al., 2016; Fawzi et al., 2022; Lutz et al., 2023). In developing DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5, we focus on the exploration aspect of RL, introducing RMaxTS to diversify the generation of proof steps. However, the exploitation aspect, specifically the problem of proof search, remains unexplored. A promising future direction is training a critic model to assess incomplete proofs and prune search branches. Such a partial-proof critic model would implicitly perform temporal credit assignment (Sutton, 1984), decomposing proof-level feedback into step-wise value differences (Arjona-Medina et al., 2019). Developing critic models for assessing long planning paths and providing guidance rewards presents a crucial and challenging problem (Ng and Russell, 2000; Sorg et al., 2010) that warrants further investigation.
items.zh: DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 的框架旨在为形式定理证明建立类似 AlphaZero 的流程。专家迭代和合成数据的使用模仿了强化学习的核心试错循环，编译器预言机作为世界模型提供环境监督。在 RL 范式内，集成的树搜索模块已被证明在推动多个领域的超人类性能方面非常有效 (Silver 等人, 2016; Fawzi 等人, 2022; Lutz 等人, 2023)。在开发 DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 时，我们专注于 RL 的探索方面，引入 RMaxTS 以多样化证明步骤的生成。然而，利用方面，特别是证明搜索问题，仍未探索。一个有前景的未来方向是训练一个评论家模型来评估不完整证明并剪枝搜索分支。这样的部分证明评论家模型将隐式执行时间信用分配 (Sutton, 1984)，将证明级反馈分解为步骤级价值差异 (Arjona-Medina 等人, 2019)。开发用于评估长规划路径并提供指导奖励的评论家模型是一个关键且具有挑战性的问题 (Ng 和 Russell, 2000; Sorg 等人, 2010)，值得进一步研究。

items.en: Finally, recent work has progressed beyond proving individual theorems to addressing real-world theory proving within complex, multi-theorem Lean files (Hu et al., 2024). This shift is a natural extension of our whole-proof generation approach. Our observations indicate that the current model already possesses some understanding of file-level context. Moving forward, we will focus on enhancing this aspect to support cutting-edge Lean mathematical formalization developers with our language model advancements.
items.zh: 最后，最近的工作已从证明单个定理发展到处理复杂多定理 Lean 文件中的现实理论证明 (Hu 等人, 2024)。这一转变是我们完整证明生成方法的自然扩展。我们的观察表明，当前模型已经具备一定的文件级上下文理解能力。未来，我们将专注于增强这一方面，以支持前沿的 Lean 数学形式化开发者利用我们的语言模型进展。
